arts.ttl: Barca come up with new plan for Torre after tough season under Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona have reportedly come up with a fresh plan for midfielder Pablo Torre who is struggling for game time under Hansi Flick this season . The plan is to send Torre out on loan next season so that he can get some football under his belt and show Hansi Flick and Co. what he can do.

arts.ttl: 2024/25 La Liga Team of the Season So Far: Mbappe, Raphinha, Yamal
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé, Raphinha and Lamine Yamal headline the 2024/25 La Liga team of the season so far.

arts.ttl: “Very difficult” – Liverpool unlikely to allow star to join Barcelona without finding replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to be very busy in the summer, and one area of their squad is set to overhauled is their attack, which has been very hot and cold this season. It is taken for granted that Darwin Nunez will depart at the end of the season, with Liverpool very keen to sign a […] The post “Very difficult” – Liverpool unlikely to allow star to join Barcelona without finding replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick behind the scenes: Flying water bottles and slamming doors
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has not given a single press conference in Spanish or Catalan, but has both the media and the Blaugrana fans eating out of his hand this season. It would appear the players too, given the results. His polite manner and straightforward approach has gone down well in Catalonia. In an anecdotal […] The post Barcelona manager Hansi Flick behind the scenes: Flying water bottles and slamming doors appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Lewandowski ‘ready to play’ for Barca against Osasuna
arts.sum: Barcelona striker Robert Lewandowski is fit and available to play on Thursday when the Catalan giants return to action in La Liga against Osasuna. The striker has since admitted he’s feeling OK and Hansi Flick told reporters before Thursday’s match the veteran is ready to go.

arts.ttl: Dembele causes a stir as former Barca star posts Gavi pic
arts.sum: PSG forward Ousmane Dembélé's new Instagram profile picture is a photo of him and Gavi from his Barcelona days pic.twitter.com/SOtnhA2juB Ousmane Dembele has caused something of a stir online by updating his Instagram profile with a photograph from his days back at Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'send scouts' to watch Premier League goalkeeper as transfer 'delay' revealed
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion goalkeeper Bart Verbruggen was reportedly watched by officials from Barcelona during the recent round of UEFA Nations League matches.
